# Meta / Facebook Developer Docs Mirror

> A crawlable Markdown mirror of Meta's developer documentation (developers.facebook.com), converted from a static HTML snapshot. Each page links back to its original developers.facebook.com URL.

## Legacy Docs

- [Batch Requests](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/batch-requests.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/batch-requests
- [Changelog](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/changelog.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/changelog
- [Debug Requests](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/guides/debugging.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/guides/debugging
- [Field Expansion](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/guides/field-expansion.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/guides/field-expansion
- [Get Started](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/get-started.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/get-started
- [Graph API](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api
- [Graph API Explorer Guide](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/guides/explorer.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/guides/explorer
- [Graph API overview](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/overview.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/overview
- [Handling Errors](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/guides/error-handling.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/guides/error-handling
- [Introduction](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/license.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/license
- [Paginated Results](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/results.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/results
- [Platform Versioning](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/guides/versioning.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/guides/versioning
- [Rate Limits](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/overview/rate-limiting.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/overview/rate-limiting
- [Secure Graph API Calls](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/guides/secure-requests.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/guides/secure-requests
- [The Facebook SDKs](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/guides/our-sdks.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/guides/our-sdks
- [Upgrade to the Latest Graph API Version](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/advanced/api-upgrade.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/advanced/api-upgrade
- [Webhooks from Meta](https://nermalcat69.github.io/meta-developer-docs/docs/graph-api/webhooks.html): mirrors https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/webhooks
